title: Player Totem (wide)
description: Customize your totems! Replace the default totem texture with your own player skin, and even use your custom cape. Make your totems truly yours!
body:
# **Description**
With this resource pack, you can replace the default Totem of Undying texture with your own custom player skin!
You can even add your custom cape behind your skin.
Yes—you can design or download any skin or cape you want (just make sure it’s in the standard size) and use it in the pack. Make your totems truly personal!



# **How to Use**
Simply navigate to the resource pack folder and follow this path:
```
assets/minecraft/textures/item
```

You’ll see two **PNG** files:
- playerskin.png → the player skin for the totem
- cape.png → the cape texture

You can replace these two files with any other skin or cape of your choice.

### Important:
- Filenames must remain **playerskin.png** and **cape.png** (all lowercase).
- Files must be in **PNG** format and follow the standard Minecraft skin/cape **size** and template.
- For convenience, you can download skins from [NameMC](https://namemc.com/minecraft-skins) or [SkinMc](https://skinmc.net/skins), and capes from [SkinMC capes](https://skinmc.net/capes), or create your own using Photoshop or other tools by **editing the default files**.



# **Note**
This resource pack only supports the wide (4-pixel arm) skin version.
A slim version of this resource pack is also available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/player-totem-(slim)).



# **Extra**
### Versions:
This resource pack is **now** available for Minecraft 1.14 to 1.21.8, so enjoy :)

### Credit:
- You’re free to use this resource pack anywhere (modpacks, videos, etc.).
- I’d be happy if you mention me and link to me, but it’s **not required**.

### Contact:
- If you want, you can join [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/UfwszAAEne) to get in touch with me.

## Made with ❤️ • FlamingShadow
